title: lesquerella occidentalis subsp. diversifolia
intro: Lesquerella occidentalis subsp. diversifolia, also known as Western buttercup or California bladderpod, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. Lesquerella occidentalis subsp. diversifolia can be prepared as an herbal supplement in the form of capsules or tinctures, and its seeds are also used as a source of the medicinal compound lesquerellen.
